title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
